meta.poznamky: sketch_code používá PenDown/PenUp protože mezera je součástí referenčního obrázku

cms.task_text: Kód má nakreslit čáru, mezeru 20px a pak znovu čáru — [hlp]ale mezera je špatná[/hlp]. Oprav ji!
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="6"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="1" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="2"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="3"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="4"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="5"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="6"><field name="DISTANCE">50</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
